description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant with broad, dark green leaves featuring prominent white veins, giving it a striking and decorative appearance. The leaves are elongated, slightly wavy, and radiate outward from a central stem, creating a lush, full canopy. The plant is housed in a vertically ribbed, cylindrical pot with a light gray color and a matte, textured finish. The pot appears to be made of ceramic or concrete, providing a sturdy base for the plant. The soil is visible at the base of the stems, and the plant's stems are a reddish-brown color, adding contrast to the green foliage. There are no visible labels, tags, or additional decorative elements on the pot.
description: A lush potted plant with broad, dark green leaves and white veins, set in a ribbed, light gray cylindrical pot. The plant's striking foliage and sturdy container make it a decorative accent.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plant's broad leaves fanning out and the ribbed texture of the light gray pot.
description_view_1: This view highlights the central leaf cluster and the pot's shadowed side, with leaves overlapping the pot's rim.
description_view_2: Side angle revealing the reddish-brown stems and more of the pot's ribbed surface, with leaves extending outward.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear leaves and the pot's full cylindrical shape, with the plant's canopy visible from behind.
